generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component transferring torque τ_G between motor and gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming torque τ_out for the first axis"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current I_M of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw current measurement I_M from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity ω from position encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position output r_M from friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox position output r_G from friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output position output r_out from friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance EstimatedMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Estimated motor position output r̂_M from friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance EstimatedGearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Estimated gearbox position output r̂_G from friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance EstimatedOutputPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Estimated output position output r̂_out from friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SystemArchitectureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Defined system architecture for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance StaticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static friction parameter derived from simulation-measurement deviations"
]

instance KineticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction parameter derived from simulation-measurement deviations"
]

instance ViscousFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Viscous friction parameter derived from simulation-measurement deviations"
]

instance DataIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensured data linkage between physical and virtual components using AAS"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comparison of simulated and measured data for deviation analysis"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control algorithm parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemArchitectureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System architecture definition using SysML models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemArchitectureInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameterInsight, KineticFrictionParameterInsight, ViscousFrictionParameterInsight
]

instance DataLinkageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data linkage and integration via Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIntegrationInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of sensor data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAdjustment
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for system architecture definition"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction dynamics simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linkage and integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLinkageService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for unified data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_Stribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_Dahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_LuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AAS_DataLinkage : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linkage between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance MABIMAX100_FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow functions as a passive entity with no virtual-to-physical interaction; it neither operates autonomously nor pushes data back to the physical robot system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live sensor data streaming via MQTT for continuous friction model identification and adjustment during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data streams via MQTT, SysML and Simulink models for structure/behavior, Asset Administration Shells for data traceability, and a unified dashboard for visualization and analysis of friction dynamics."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated stage, with continuous updates based on operational data during robot use to account for wear, tool changes, and application-specific variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated through comparison of simulated data (from friction models) against measured reference data; deviations used to identify friction losses. Specific uncertainty quantification or formal verification methods not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow, ensuring real-time data transmission for friction model processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML are used for modeling; no other standards (e.g., Industrie 4.0) are explicitly referenced in the document."
]
